name: Default Business Permission Scheme
description: Jira default for newly-created Business projects that are not created with shared config.

name: Default Software Permission Scheme
description: Jira default for newly-created Software projects that are not created with shared config.

name: Jira Service Desk Permission Scheme for Project IT1234
description: This Jira Service Desk Permission Scheme was generated for Project IT1234

name: Jira Service Management Permission Scheme for Project CHANGE
description: This Jira Service Management Permission Scheme was generated for Project CHANGE

name: Jira Service Management Permission Scheme for Project FACILITIES
description: This is the general Jira Service Management permission scheme for full-company use service management projects.

name: Jira Service Management Permission Scheme for Project OMI1121
description: This Jira Service Management Permission Scheme was generated for Project OMI1121

name: JSM Permission Scheme - Added to project only
description:
View Issues: Team and Customers roles
Comment

name: JSM Permission Scheme - Generic
description: This is the general Jira Service Management permission scheme for full-company use service management projects.

name: JSM Restricted Permission Scheme - Company visibility, team access
description: Permission scheme that allows all users to view, comment, and watch issues, but only the Service Desk Team role can work/transition/submit issues.

name: Restricted Permission Scheme - Interaction
description: Permission scheme relies on the project roles Administrator and Developer for interaction. Anyone who doesn't have one of those roles is only able to view issues. The two-tier permission scheme allows for Project Administrators to do everything in the project, while the Developer Project role limits users with that role to the same permissions that they have in a regular Jira project as a signed-in user

name: Restricted Permission Scheme - Secure Viewers Issue Security
description: This permission scheme is required to support the Secure Viewers issue security scheme (only allowing people added to an issue to view that specific issue). Administrator and Team Member project roles, as well as users added to the "Secure Viewers" field can interact with issues.

name: Restricted Permission Scheme - Visibility - Service Desk Team
description: Permission scheme that restricts both visibility and interaction to users/groups added to the Administrator or Service Desk Team project roles.

name: Restricted Permission Scheme - Visibility - Team Members
description: Permission scheme that restricts both visibility and interaction to users/groups added to the Administrator or Team Members project roles.

name: Software Permission Scheme - Edit Workflow
description: The default permission scheme for Software projects, but allows project admins to edit workflows. Should only be used for projects that use a unique workflow.

name: zRead-Only Permission Scheme (All Platforms)
description: Limits all interactions for projects using this scheme to admins only. All logged-in users can view the project as normal.
